detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 時事英文 (English for Current Events)	開課班級 : 華文一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 楊惠玲	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course aims to provide students with the opportunity to develop global views via news readings. Also covered is Business English such as presentations, meetings, and emails. Guidance will be given and yet the ability to learn English independently is highly emphasized in this course. The content also includes advice on how to learn English more effectively. Students will be encouraged to find out which method suits them best. 


2.教學綱要
Students will be guided to read local and global news of various types. Visual aids such as video clips may serve as complimentary materials. Quizzes and homework assignments are designed to evaluate students’ learning progress. Students will also be given opportunities to show their understanding of subject materials via individual and group presentation throughtout the semester.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
quizzes: 40%; presentations: 15%; homework assignments: 30%; participation: 15%  
Unless otherwise addressed, no electronic devices are allowed in class. 
Being absent for three times before the midterm may result in an early warming. Once the number of absence reaches six, no final exam (including other assignments) can be given to the student.
